name: Stanley Druckenmiller
philosophy: Press hard when secular growth and macro align, but stay intellectually flexible when the tape or regime changes.
heuristics: look for powerful trends with catalysts
change your mind fast when the facts change
risk_rules: Do not stay loyal to a thesis after the catalyst breaks.

commentary_snapshots.summary: Repeated that the best setups happen when macro and earnings trends align.

holdings_snapshots.note: Dynamic mix of growth leaders and macro expressions.

blind_spots: Can be too fast for slower capital bases
